common.tagline: Anonymous internship reviews by students, for students

hero.title: Find your perfect internship
hero.subtitle: Read honest reviews from real interns. 100% anonymous.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Use your university email to get a magic link. No password needed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Share your internship experience across 5 rating categories.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your anonymous review helps thousands pick the right internship.

empty.companiesDesc: No companies reviewed yet. Share your internship experience and help fellow students!
empty.reviewsDesc: Be the first to share your internship story. It only takes a few minutes and helps thousands of students.

floating.quote1: Share your story and help fellow students choose their next internship.
floating.quote2: Rate mentorship, culture, compensation and more across 5 categories.
floating.quote3: University email verification ensures authenticity without revealing your identity.

company.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!

companies.noFilter: No companies found for this filter
companies.emptyDesc: Be the first to share your internship experience and help fellow students make better career decisions.

submit.title: Share Your Internship Experience
submit.subtitle: Help fellow students make better decisions. Your review is 100% anonymous.

email.label: University Email
email.hint: We only accept .edu, .ca, and .fr university emails
email.sentDescription: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click it to continue.

form.receivedOffer: Did you receive a return offer?
form.bodyPlaceholder: Share your experience... What did you learn? What was the culture like?

success.title: Thank you!
success.description: Your review has been submitted and is pending approval. It will be visible within 48 hours.
